evidence.voice_certainty: Flat assertions, cheerful commands, direct questions, and the I/we/you triangle reproduce the reference without deviation.
evidence.method_execution: The squirrel analogy, trapped objections, instinct-versus-intellect inversion, and open-mind instruction execute the same belief moves as the reference.
evidence.structure_anatomy: The preview, escalating titled sections, all-caps verdicts, explicit SECOND INSTRUCTION, and SUMMARY are identical to the reference anatomy.
evidence.repetition_mantra: BAD SUGAR and Nature's Guide recur as disciplined fixed phrases, with no divergence from the reference's repetition pattern.
evidence.emotional_register: The medical scare is delivered at full force and then explicitly disowned as fear before promising escape to freedom.
evidence.rhythm_texture: Flowing explanatory paragraphs alternate with trap questions, concrete analogies, and short all-caps peak lines exactly as in the reference.

gap_summary: There is no craft gap because the candidate reproduces the reference verbatim in every scored dimension.

suggestions.suggestion: Make no prose revision to this control chapter; have the reviewer preserve its direct questions, settled assertions, commands, and all-caps verdict peaks as a zero-distance acceptance pattern for any subject.
Encode the existing preview-to-analogy-to-objection-to-scare-to-disowning-to-instruction-to-summary escalation mechanically in each chapter card, while changing the subject matter.
Require each trap label to recur verbatim as BAD SUGAR does here while rejecting verbatim reuse of ordinary sentences, and preserve the argue-then-compress beat before the label becomes a refrain.
